# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.payment-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "payment-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.notification-service.io
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - analytics.thirdparty.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - auth.identity-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "auth-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cloud-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - replica-db.cloud-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 6380
      name: tls-redis
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "session-service"
    - "cache-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  addresses:
    - 10.200.0.0/24
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 27017
      name: tcp-mongo
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "catalog-service"
    - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api-dr
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  host: api.payment-provider.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.payment-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DO_NOT_UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api-dr
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  host: api.notification-service.io
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.notification-service.io
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 30
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api-dr
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  host: analytics.thirdparty.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: analytics.thirdparty.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 20
        connectTimeout: 15s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 200
        maxRetries: 1
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 60s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider-dr
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  host: auth.identity-provider.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: auth.identity-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 2
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary-dr
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  host: primary-db.cloud-provider.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: primary-db.cloud-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-replica-dr
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  host: replica-db.cloud-provider.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: replica-db.cloud-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache-dr
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  host: redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: redis-cache.cloud-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 150
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 5
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-dr
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  host: mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 80
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api-vs
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "payment-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.payment-provider.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.payment-provider.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api-vs
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.notification-service.io
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "notification-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.notification-service.io
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.notification-service.io
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-vs
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  hosts:
    - mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "istio-system"
    - "catalog-service"
    - "user-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 27017
      route:
        - destination:
            host: mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com
            port:
              number: 27017
          weight: 100
---
# Sidecar resource to enforce egress restriction at the mesh level.
# This restricts all namespaces to only reach services explicitly
# defined via ServiceEntry and exported to their namespace,
# preventing unrestricted egress from the mesh.
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/*"
        - "~/*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
# Per-namespace sidecar for payment-service to limit egress scope
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sidecar
  namespace: payment-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-payment-api"
        - "istio-system/external-auth-provider"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
# Per-namespace sidecar for notification-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sidecar
  namespace: notification-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-notification-api"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
# Per-namespace sidecar for analytics-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-sidecar
  namespace: analytics-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-analytics-api"
        - "istio-system/external-postgres-replica"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
# Per-namespace sidecar for order-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: order-service-sidecar
  namespace: order-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-postgres-primary"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---

  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-postgres-primary"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---

    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY

    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY

# Per-namespace sidecar for session-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: session-service-sidecar
  namespace: session-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-redis-cache"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1

  name: cache-service-sidecar
  namespace: cache-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-redis-cache"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
# Per-namespace sidecar for catalog-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: catalog-service-sidecar
  namespace: catalog-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-mongodb"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
# Per-namespace sidecar for user-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: user-service-sidecar
  namespace: user-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/external-mongodb"
        - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
# AuthorizationPolicy to deny all egress by default and only allow
# explicitly defined external hosts per source namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-egress-default
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - to:
        - operation:
            notHosts:
              - "api.payment-provider.com"
              - "api.notification-service.io"
              - "analytics.thirdparty.com"
              - "auth.identity-provider.com"
              - "primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
              - "replica-db.cloud-provider.com"
              - "redis-cache.cloud-provider.com"
              - "mongodb-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
      from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "payment-service"
              - "notification-service"
              - "analytics-service"
              - "order-service"
              - "inventory-service"
              - "reporting-service"
              - "auth-service"
              - "session-service"
              - "cache-service"
              - "catalog-service"
              - "user-service"
---
# PeerAuthentication to enforce mTLS across the mesh
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-wide-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
